task_completion.description: Eclipse IDE is open with the DoseCalculator project loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse IDE window is visible, and 'DoseCalculator' is listed in the Package Explorer or Project Explorer view.

task_completion.description: The project properties or run configurations dialog is opened to configure the library path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog box such as 'Properties for DoseCalculator' (Java Build Path section) or 'Run Configurations' (Arguments tab) is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: The native library path is correctly set to /opt/medphys/lib.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The path '/opt/medphys/lib' is visible in a 'Native Library Folder Configuration' dialog, or as a VM argument (e.g., -Djava.library.path=/opt/medphys/lib) in the Run Configurations.

task_completion.description: The Main class is executed successfully without an UnsatisfiedLinkError.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eclipse Console view shows output from the application running, and there are no red stack traces indicating a missing library or UnsatisfiedLinkError.

task_completion.description: The dose_report.txt file is generated and contains the correct calculated value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'dose_report.txt' is visible in the Eclipse Package Explorer (may require a refresh) or is opened in the editor showing the expected result value of 45.5.

integrity.description: The agent used the Eclipse GUI to configure the native library path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration was done through Eclipse dialog windows (Properties or Run Configurations), rather than manually editing .classpath or .project files in a terminal or external text editor.

integrity.description: The application was run using Eclipse's built-in execution tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application output appears in the Eclipse Console view, rather than being executed via 'java' commands in an external terminal window.

integrity.description: The output file was generated by the program, not manually typed.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent manually creating 'dose_report.txt' and typing '45.5' into it. The file should appear as a result of running the Java application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/eclipse-workspace/DoseCalculator. Native library path to link: /opt/medphys/lib. Expected output file: dose_report.txt. Expected calculated result value inside the report: 45.5.
